pages.text:
TE’S RAYCHEM SCREENED T-CONNECTORS
RSTI-X9
FOR LARGE CROSS SECTIONS, INTERFACE C, RATED UP TO 1250A/42 kV
KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem Screened separable T-connectors RSTI-x9
are designed to connect single and three-core polymeric cables to medium
• Screened connector does
voltage gas insulated switchgear and other equipment using bushings type
not need to be removed for
“C” (EN50180/EN50181) specified for 630/1250A up to 42 kV.
over sheath testing
Made of a highly modified silicone rubber and screened by a thin-walled,
• Wide application range
grounded outer conductive screen, TE’s Raychem RSTI-x9 connectors are
covers cable cross sections
equally suited for indoor and outdoor application.
from 400 mm2 to 1000 mm2
Supporting a wide application range, the design incorporates one body
• E asy access rear plug with
and three stress cone adapters to cover any cross-sections from
capacitive test point
400 mm2 to 1000 mm2 and any voltage classes from 12 kV to 42 kV. The
conductor connection will be provided with mechanical lugs. The overall
• Insulation made of highly
and cut-back dimensions are designed to take up minimum space in the
modified silicone rubber
terminal box.
• Compact design supports
TE’s Raychem RSTI-x9 connectors are equipped with a capacitive test point
use of double “T”
for determining whether the circuit is energised. A conductive cap protects
connections inside
this test point.
standard terminal boxes
The RSTI-x9 connectors exceeds CENELEC HD 629.1 S2 requirements,
• Unlimited shelf-life
which includes BS; VDE and other international specifications. Our kits
include high performance mechanical lugs.
Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s
proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support.
ENERGY /// TE’S RAYCHEM SCREENED T-CONNECTORS RSTI-X9

images.context_text: TE’S RAYCHEM SCREENED T-CONNECTORS RSTI-X9 FOR LARGE CROSS SECTIONS, INTERFACE C, RATED UP TO 1250A/42 kV KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem Screened separable T-connectors RSTI-x9 are designed to connect single and three-core polymeric cables to medium • Screened connector does voltage gas insulated switchgear and other equipment using bushings type not need to be removed for “C” (EN50180/EN50181) specified for 630/1250A up to 42 kV. over sheath testing Made of a highly modified silicone rubber and screened by a thin-walled, • Wide application range grounded outer conductive screen, TE’s Raychem RSTI-x9 connectors are covers cable cross sections equally suited for indoor and outdoor application. from 400 mm2 to 1000 mm2 Supporting a wide application range, the design incorporates one body • E asy access rear plug with and three stress cone adapters to cover any cross-sections from capacitive test point 400 mm2 to 1000 mm2 and any voltage classes from 12 kV to 42 kV. The conductor connection will be provided with mechanical lugs. The overall • Insulation made of highly and cut-back dimensions are designed to take up minimum space in the modified silicone rubber terminal box. • Compact design supports TE’s Raychem RSTI-x9 connectors are equipped with a capacitive test point use of double “T” for determining whether the circuit is energised. A conductive cap protects connections inside this test point. standard terminal boxes The RSTI-x9 connectors exceeds CENELEC HD 629.1 S2 requirements, • Unlimited shelf-life which includes BS; VDE and other international specifications. Our kits include high performance mechanical lugs. Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support. ENERGY /// TE’S RAYCHEM SCREENED T-CONNECTORS RSTI-X9

The conductor connection will be provided with mechanical lugs. The overall • Insulation made of highly and cut-back dimensions are designed to take up minimum space in the modified silicone rubber terminal box. • Compact design supports TE’s Raychem RSTI-x9 connectors are equipped with a capacitive test point use of double “T” for determining whether the circuit is energised. A conductive cap protects connections inside this test point. standard terminal boxes The RSTI-x9 connectors exceeds CENELEC HD 629.1 S2 requirements, • Unlimited shelf-life which includes BS; VDE and other international specifications. Our kits include high performance mechanical lugs. Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support. TE’S RAYCHEM SCREENED T-CONNECTORS RSTI-X9 FOR LARGE CROSS SECTIONS, INTERFACE C, RATED UP TO 1250A/42 kV KEY FEATURES TE Connectivity’s (TE) Raychem Screened separable T-connectors RSTI-x9 are designed to connect single and three-core polymeric cables to medium • Screened connector does voltage gas insulated switchgear and other equipment using bushings type not need to be removed for “C” (EN50180/EN50181) specified for 630/1250A up to 42 kV. over sheath testing Made of a highly modified silicone rubber and screened by a thin-walled, • Wide application range grounded outer conductive screen, TE’s Raychem RSTI-x9 connectors are covers cable cross sections equally suited for indoor and outdoor application. from 400 mm2 to 1000 mm2 Supporting a wide application range, the design incorporates one body • E asy access rear plug with and three stress cone adapters to cover any cross-sections from capacitive test point 400 mm2 to 1000 mm2 and any voltage classes from 12 kV to 42 kV. The conductor connection will be provided with mechanical lugs. The overall • Insulation made of highly and cut-back dimensions are designed to take up minimum space in the modified silicone rubber terminal box. • Compact design supports TE’s Raychem RSTI-x9 connectors are equipped with a capacitive test point use of double “T” for determining whether the circuit is energised. A conductive cap protects connections inside this test point. standard terminal boxes The RSTI-x9 connectors exceeds CENELEC HD 629.1 S2 requirements, • Unlimited shelf-life which includes BS; VDE and other international specifications. Our kits include high performance mechanical lugs. Customers can count on consistent, high quality products, driven by TE’s proven innovation and backed by our extraordinary customer support. pages.text:
TE’s Raychem Screened T-Connectors
RSTI-x9
The RSTI-x9 screened cable connectors meet CENELEC
HD 629.1 S2 requirements, which includes BS, VDE and
196
other international specifications.
116
TECHNICAL DATA 79
Cable insulation diameter range 28.9 mm - 59.0 mm
Connector cross-section range 400 mm2 - 1000 mm2
Maximum system voltage 42 kV
Continuous current rating 1250A*
Basic impulse level 200 kV 372
Partial discharge at 2 U < 2 pC
0
AC voltage withstand. 5 min. 93.5 kV
DC voltage withstand, 15 min. 125 kV
Thermal short circuit, 1 s 74.5 kA
Thermal short circuit, 3 s 43 kA
Dynamic short circuit 125 kA
* 1250 A is relevant for upgraded bushing C2 and cables with copper conductors.
The adapters meet the international CENELEC HD 629.1 S2 specification.

min max
